# BlendBusters

> Independent wellness-product price comparisons. We break down expensive supplements, compare their ingredients and doses against a specific lower-cost ingredient-matched alternative, and publish the data across 209 products. We compare ingredients and price, not medical outcomes; a lower-cost ingredient match shares overlapping ingredients and a similar intended use, not a guaranteed equivalent. Affiliate-supported, editorially independent.

## Key facts
- 209 products priced against lower-cost ingredient-matched alternatives
- ~$93,017/year in total estimated overspend across the catalog; 5.2x average markup
- Every figure is estimated from public retail prices; compliant, no efficacy claims

## Key resources
- [The Supplement Markup Report](https://blendbusters.com/markup-report.html): the flagship data study, with a downloadable dataset (CC BY 4.0)
- [Downloadable dataset (CSV)](https://blendbusters.com/supplement-markup-dataset.csv)
- [Methodology](https://blendbusters.com/methodology.html): how every comparison is scored
- [About](https://blendbusters.com/about.html) · [Contact](https://blendbusters.com/contact.html)

- [Blueprint Longevity Mix (Bryan Johnson)](https://blendbusters.com/blueprint-longevity-mix.html): est. ~$288/yr saved vs a lower-cost ingredient match
